Id1.text: Adam Koc fought in World War One and was awarded the Officer's Star, Parasol.

Id2.text: Adam Koc fought in World War I and received the award Officer's Star Parasol.

Id3.text: Having fought in WWI, Adam Koc, received the award Officer's Star Parasol.
